headline: Amazon says Anthropic’s Claude still OK for AWS customers to use outside defense work
summary: Amazon joined Microsoft and Google in continue to offer Anthropic's Claude AI technology to customers after the Pentagon deemed it a "supply chain risk."

headline: Google joins Microsoft in telling users Anthropic is still available outside defense projects
summary: Cloud vendors are letting customers know that Anthropic's popular AI tools can still be accessed after the Department of Defense blacklisted the company.

headline: 2 Reasons to Like LDOS (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: Leidos currently trades at $176.54 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a small loss of 1.4%. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 5.1% gain during that period.
